name: The Memory In Walden Pond
short_description: Imitate ancient Chinese,In the bamboo forest landscape, survival hunting, farming herding horses, fishing qiao Jiang Zhu, build their own peach blossom source.
detailed_description:
this is a role-playing game that integrates rural survival, home construction and other gameplay, allowing you to freely experience the rural life of ancient China to a certain extent.

Main gameplay

1. Pastoral survival: The scene content of the game aims to restore the ancient Chinese bamboo forest landscape, so that players can collect resources in such a world environment, farming and hunting, and experience the ancient living environment.
2. Home construction: Players can build traditional Chinese buildings in the world according to their own resources to create their own peach blossom source

Other gameplay

There are some hidden content in the game for players to dig
